rationale: Top-level review summary called out malformed remediation handling; router now preserves present non-object remediation payloads for service validation, with regression coverage.
Updated task-shaped create normalization to pass through any present remediation payload and added a malformed-payload router regression test.
Exported Alembic revision metadata through __all__ to mark it as intentionally consumed by Alembic.
Exported Alembic down_revision metadata through __all__ to mark it as intentionally consumed by Alembic.
Exported Alembic branch_labels metadata through __all__ to mark it as intentionally consumed by Alembic.
Exported Alembic depends_on metadata through __all__ to mark it as intentionally consumed by Alembic.
Pinned the resolved remediation target workflowId and runId back into stored task parameters and the workflow start payload, with service-level regression coverage.
